languages.text: {n}Альва-9 удовлетворенно кивает. Измазанный кровью и копотью бригадир Паск молча склоняет голову.{/n}
{n}Alva-9 nods in satisfaction. Foreman Pask, covered in blood and soot, bows his head in silence.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Альва-9 удовлетворенно кивает. Измазанный кровью и копотью бригадир Паск молча склоняет голову.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Alva-9 nods in satisfaction. Foreman Pask, covered in blood and soot, bows his head in silence.{/n}
{n}Alva-9 nods in satisfaction. Foreman Pask, covered in blood and soot, bows his head in silence.{/n}

languages.text: {n}アルバ9は満足そうに頷いた。血と煤まみれの大工長パスクは黙って頭を下げた。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Alva-9 nods in satisfaction. Foreman Pask, covered in blood and soot, bows his head in silence.{/n}

traits.locale_text: アルバ9は満足そうに頷いた。血と煤まみれの Foreman Pask は黙って頭を下げた。

languages.text: {n}Alva-9 asiente, satisfecha. El capataz Pask, cubierto de sangre y hollín, inclina la cabeza en silencio.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Alva-9 nods in satisfaction. Foreman Pask, covered in blood and soot, bows his head in silence.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Alva-9 asiente, satisfecha. El capataz Pask, cubierto de sangre y hollín, inclina la cabeza en silencio.{/n}

languages.text: {n}阿尔瓦-9满意地点点头。浑身血污与烟灰的工头帕斯克沉默地低下了头。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Alva-9 nods in satisfaction. Foreman Pask, covered in blood and soot, bows his head in silence.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}阿尔瓦-9满意地点点头。浑身血污与烟灰的工头帕斯克沉默地低下了头。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Alva-9 nickt zufrieden. Der mit Blut und Asche bedeckte Vorarbeiter Pask senkt schweigend seinen Kopf.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Alva-9 nods in satisfaction. Foreman Pask, covered in blood and soot, bows his head in silence.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Alva-9 nickt zufrieden. Der mit Blut und Asche bedeckte Vorarbeiter Pask senkt schweigend seinen Kopf.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Alva-9, memnuniyetle başını sallıyor. Kan ve is içindeki Ustabaşı Pask, sessizce başını eğiyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Alva-9 nods in satisfaction. Foreman Pask, covered in blood and soot, bows his head in silence.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Alva-9, memnuniyetle başını sallıyor. Kan ve is içindeki Ustabaşı Pask, sessizce başını eğiyor.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Alva-9 acquiesce d'un air satisfait. Couvert de sang et de suie, le contremaître Pask incline la tête sans dire un mot.{/n}
